feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to send XML file as email from Manage Electronic Document App
entry.content:
HI Fellow S/4 Public cloud users.

We have configured system to send XML file via email from Manage electronic document Apps .But unable to do so. 

Please share your experience.

Thanks,

Pallavi.

entry.title: Journal Entry API: HSN/SAC Code Maintenance
entry.content:
Dear Team,

HSN/SAC Code Maintenance via API

We would like to understand where and how the HSN/SAC code can be maintained or passed through SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud APIs so that it correctly reflects in the accounting document.
Below is the tax-related structure we are currently using:

<ProductTaxItem>
    <TaxCountry>IN</TaxCountry>
    <TaxItemClassification>S</TaxItemClassification>
    <ProductiveTaxText>998312</ProductiveTaxText>
</ProductTaxItem>

We are using the Journal Entry – Post (Asynchronous) API to post these transactions.

Kindly advise on the correct approach, supported fields, or any recommended configuration to ensure proper reflection of the HSN/SAC code in the accounting document.

Looking forward to your guidance and recommendations.

Thanks & Regards

Nilesh ***REMOVED BY MODERATION***

entry.title: How to retrieve app usage (apps executed per user) for last months in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and would like to track user activity in terms of app usage. Specifically, we want to retrieve:

  • Which Fiori apps were executed

  • Execution count per user

  • Over the last few months (e.g., 1–6 months).

Could you advise on which application or tool we can use to obtain this information?

Thanks & Regards

Sandeep

entry.title: Standard algorithm 001 finding matches outside defined parameter sets
entry.content:
Hi,

We are having an issue where some bank transactions are being automatically allocated to the wrong customer account.

We had this issue a while ago and believed this was because interpretation algorithm 001 was searching for unspecific references on the customer accounts (e.g. the word "payment") so we limited the reference document number range under Define Parameter Sets as per below:

This seems to have somewhat reduced the problem but I'm told we are still "randomly" getting transactions incorrectly allocated to the wrong customer accounts by interpretation algorithm 001, e.g. in the below case:

From a quick glance I believe these transactions are being allocated based on the fact that the word "payment" appears in the bank statement memo and as a reference on the customer accounts.

-Is there anything that would cause the algorithm to ignore the range specified in the defined parameter sets and search for components of the bank statement memo outside of this range? We are uploading the bank statements using "Manage Incoming Payment Files" not "Upload Bank Statements". Is there something we haven't configured correctly?

-Is there a way to identify exactly which string the algorithm used to match the bank transaction to the wrong customer account? The log in Reprocess Bank Statement Items doesn't give enough detail.

Thanks

entry.title: Mapping custom retention field into the supplier invoice
entry.content:
We are using public cloud.

In Purchase Order, the standard retention field value is not getting printed in the form upon saving.

Therefore we have brought in a BADI and saving the value in Custom CDS from where we are doing the job. But even in that the retention field is getting printed in the form only after editing and making changes to the existing P.O. (Lets say creating a P.O, saving it.. again editing some values which are relevant to print out changes and then saving it again)

Now we have brought in the retention to the custom field. Our primary purpose to print the retention value into the P.O form is resolved.

But we are having difficulties to link the custom field with the supplier invoice line item where system calculates the retention amount (which earlier populated from the standard field in the P.O) for payment block to a special G/L account for a supplier

Currently could not find any badi to make the changes at P.O level.

Any help is much appreciated.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Loss Handling in the Consolidation under Equity method
entry.content:
Dear Experts

We have encountered a scenario in consolidation where one of the entities is accounted for using the equity method, with a shareholding of 35%. Unfortunately, the entity is currently reporting losses, and these losses have exceeded the carrying amount of the investment.

As per IFRS, the investment cannot be written down to zero, and the company does not plan to infuse additional capital. In the subsequent year, once the entity starts generating revenue, these losses will be offset, and the investment will reflect its actual value.

We are currently unable to locate system settings to handle this scenario in consolidation. Could anyone provide guidance or the steps to correctly manage such a situation in the system while remaining IFRS-compliant?

Regards 

Srinivas Thatikonda

entry.title: Can PR Overall Release enforce per-item approval?
entry.content:
We are using Purchase Requisition – Overall Release workflow in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
Now each PR item has its own Cost Center and approvers depend on that Cost Center (maintained via custom table).

Example:
Item 10 (CC A --> approvers B/C)
Item 20 (CC D --> approvers E/F)
We need Item 10 to be approved by B or C and Item 20 by E or F before the PR is released. 

Is there any supported way to achieve this with Overall Release, or is Item Release workflow the only option?

entry.title: Clarification on Mandatory Recipe Group Field in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We would like to seek clarification regarding the Recipe Group field in Master Recipe creation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition).

Observation:
In the standard application for creating a Master Recipe, the Recipe Group field is currently optional. We have reviewed available configuration options and could not identify any standard setting to make this field mandatory at creation time.Requirement:
From a business and data governance perspective, the Recipe Group is required to be maintained consistently for all Master Recipes.

entry.title: Cash discount indicator is automatically set in Material master SAP public cloud
entry.content:
In SAP Public cloud edition,
I see that in the while creating a material master through Fiori apps "Manage product master data", "Create material - MM01" and through migration cockpit also,

I'm seeing the cash discount indicator in Sales org 1 view is automatically set.
I can see that in SAP on-premise and cloud private editions, it was mentioned as an satndard behavior. (See SAP note 1813559).

Is this an standard behavior in SAP public cloud edition also?????

entry.title: No cost center mandatory in the app Post goods issue unplanned
entry.content: I am trying to find where it is maintained in the public cloud that the EWM app post goods issue - unplanned does not require any cost center for scrapping. It is posted with movement type 551 but only with profit center without cost center. How can I find where this is maintained? Why does the app not require the cost center even when its mandatory for the movement type 551 in MIGO? How does the app know which movement type to use for scrapping?

entry.title: Change or Diable Timesheet bell icon notification for all users
entry.content:
Hello

I want to change the text for meaasage appearing under bell icon for Time sheet rejection. If it is not possible to change the text can we stop this notification for all users.

 

Thank you.

BR; Meenu

entry.title: Can the decision buttons be disabled in a to-do list task tile?
entry.content:
When there is a task in a user's to-do list related to a workflow, is it possible to disable the approve/reject buttons on the tile? We would like to ensure that users are forced to navigate into the detail of the object for approval, rather than have the ability to approve/reject without reviewing the detail.

See image below, we would like to disable approve & reject.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: How to restrict Credit Release validity
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently configuring Basic Credit Management (Scope Item BD6) in an S/4HANA Public Cloud environment.

I have a specific requirement regarding the validity of a released document (Documented Credit Decision - DCD). I want to ensure that a manual release granted by a credit manager is only valid for the same day. If the document is not processed (e.g., delivered) on the same day, it should be blocked again and require a new credit check/decision the following day.

For testing purposes, I approved a documented credit decision and scheduled a re-check run. Even after two days, the job skips the document for the re-check and the job log displays the following message: " Document has not been checked because the release date is still valid." 

How can this be maintained correctly?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards
Katja

entry.title: Populate the BP Address Comment using API
entry.content:
In S4HANA Public Cloud, I'm trying to create a BP using API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.

However, there is a particular field that I cannot populate due to the field is not available in the API.

This Comment field in the BP Address. 

Can anyone help how to populate this field using API_BUSINESS_PARTNER?

entry.title: MD79 ISSUE "XXL has not been installed correctly!"
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am facing an issue when running transaction MD79 via Fiori.

When I execute MD79 in SAP GUI, it works correctly and the Excel export for PIRs is generated without any issue. However, when I run the same transaction via Fiori, I receive this error message during the export "XXL has not been installed correctly!"

Do you have any idea what could be causing this issue and how it can be resolved?

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: How to Product Description in Ship HU Form - Extend the HU form
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a functional requirement to display the product description in the Ship HU form. During our analysis, we identified the following issue:
the product description is not available in the form data source, specifically at the item nodes level.

For this reason, we started an investigation to find a standard or technical solution. However: we did not find any available data source extension for this template, it is not possible to add a custom field, since the only available Business Context is reserved for the Header section: Handling Unit (HANDLINGUNIT).

Therefore, we would appreciate your support in identifying a solution or technical alternative to display the product description in the Ship HU form.

Thank you in advance for your support.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Integration: Shift notes from S/4hana Public Cloud to SAP DM
entry.content: At the moment it is not possible to transfer shift notes from S/4HANA public Cloud to SAP DM. Is there any option to integrate shift notes?

entry.title: "Schedule Billing Creation" Batch job collective billing
entry.content:
Hi.

We are currently using the background job “Schedule Billing Creation” to automatically create billing documents for Sales Scheduling Agreements.

As part of this process, the job creates billing documents for outbound deliveries that have been goods issue posted and are available in the Billing Due List.

However, we are facing an issue where the batch job is combining all outbound deliveries related to a single Sales Scheduling Agreement into one invoice, with each outbound delivery appearing as a line item on the same invoice. This follows the concept of collective billing.

Our requirement is to prevent this behavior. We would like the batch job to create a separate invoice for each outbound delivery.

Could you please advise if there is any configuration available to ensure that this job generates only one invoice per outbound delivery?

I have updated the Billing Settings in the VF04 - Create Billing Documents Fiori app to create separate billing documents for each item in billing due list. But, still it's not working.

entry.title: Just-in-sequence: Sequence Number in POs
entry.content:
Hey,

is it possible to work with sequence numbers in production orders in the public cloud?

Kind regards,

Jana

entry.title: Is it possible to add a new plant to a company code in the Starter System?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,


I’m working in an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Starter System, and I would like to create a new plant for testing purposes.
My assumption is that it’s not possible to create new plants manually in the starter system, as the organizational structure is usually predefined and not fully configurable there.


Can anyone confirm whether creating a new plant in the starter system is allowed?

 

Thank you in advance!
